dataFlows.transformKql: source | extend TimeGenerated = iff(isnull(['effective_at']), now(), datetime(1970-01-01) + (['effective_at'] * 1s)) , Id = ['id'] , EventType = ['type'] , EffectiveAt = datetime(1970-01-01) + (['effective_at'] * 1s) , ActorType = tostring(actor.type) , ActorApiKey = todynamic(actor.api_key) , ActorSession = todynamic(actor.session) , Project = ['project'] , ConnectorName = ['friendlyName'] | project TimeGenerated , Id , EventType , EffectiveAt , ActorType , ActorApiKey , ActorSession , Project , EventDetails , ConnectorName

source | extend TimeGenerated = iff(isnull(['created']), now(), datetime(1970-01-01) + (['created'] * 1s)) , Id = ['id'] , ObjectType = ['object'] , CreatedAt = datetime(1970-01-01) + (['created'] * 1s) , Model = ['model'] , RequestId = ['request_id'] , ServiceTier = ['service_tier'] , SystemFingerprint = ['system_fingerprint'] , Choices = ['choices'] , Usage = ['usage'] , Metadata = ['metadata'] , ToolChoice = ['tool_choice'] , Tools = ['tools'] , Temperature = ['temperature'] , TopProbability = ['top_p'] , FrequencyPenalty = ['frequency_penalty'] , PresencePenalty = ['presence_penalty'] , Seed = ['seed'] , InputUser = ['input_user'] , ResponseFormat = ['response_format'] , ConnectorName = ['friendlyName'] | project TimeGenerated , Id , ObjectType , CreatedAt , Model , RequestId , ServiceTier , SystemFingerprint , Choices , Usage , Metadata , ToolChoice , Tools , Temperature , TopProbability , FrequencyPenalty , PresencePenalty , Seed , InputUser , ResponseFormat , ConnectorName
